arts.ttl: Napoli dreaming big ahead of Juve clash
arts.sum: Napoli are enjoying their longest ever streak of consecutive home victories against Juventus in Serie A (5, with an aggregate score of 12-4) and they could become only the third team to beat the Bianconeri for more than five home games in a row in the history of the top-flight after Roma (6 between 1937 and 1941), Inter (8 between 1935 and 1943) and Fiorentina (6 between 1960 and 1964). Napoli have won six of their last 10 games against Juventus in Serie A (D2 L2), at least two more wins against the Bianconeri than any other team in the top-flight since the start of 2020.

arts.ttl: Napoli Taking Steps to Beat Chelsea to Man Utd Outcast
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United re-established contact for Argentine forward Alejandro Garnacho on Friday. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the Serie A pacesetters renewed talks with the Red Devils yesterday as they bid to complete a mouth-watering double swoop this winter.
